title: Block-pattern registry — report_type → block patterns + per-block approved annotations
description: A5 consults this to decide which block types to emit per report_type, and which annotations are approved for each block_type. Per Phase-1 finding: A5 may render only approved annotations; the schema enforces this via the per-block annotation contracts already declared in a5-data-blocks.schema.json. This registry adds the report-type → blocks mapping and per-block 'events_of_interest_displays' rule (resolves view_search_results-0 finding).

patterns.description: Map of report_type to its block pattern.

description_templates.description: Neutral, descriptive sentence templates keyed by block_type. The A5 describe layer fills {placeholders} from a block's description_facts to produce block.description. Templates restate figures only — they MUST NOT contain causal, evaluative, judgemental, or recommending language. Use the literal token {delta_clause} where an optional period-over-period clause (from delta_clauses) should be spliced in.

delta_clauses.description: Neutral comparative clauses spliced into a template's {delta_clause} slot when a block carries a period-over-period delta. Keyed by factual direction. Magnitude and direction only ('higher than', 'lower than', 'unchanged from') — never evaluative ('improved'/'worsened') or causal.

narrative_stages.description: Ordered funnel-narrative stages A6 groups blocks into. Render order = this array order (also encoded by `order`). Each stage carries a templated intro caption and a handoff caption to the next stage. Intro/handoff are method-framing only — descriptive, never causal links between stages.

narrative_stage_map.description: First-match-wins rules mapping a block to a narrative_stage. Each rule matches over the block's metric / dimension / stage_kind / event signals; a key set to "*" (or omitted) is a wildcard. The first rule whose every specified key matches wins; if none match, narrative_default_stage applies.

narrative_default_stage.description: Fallback stage when no narrative_stage_map rule matches a block.

blocks.description: Ordered blocks A5 emits for this report_type, in render order.

events_of_interest_displays.description: Resolves view_search_results-0 finding. For blocks that render per-page/per-group event mixes, the listed events MUST always have their actual count surfaced (not collapsed to in-top-K badges). Each entry: { block_type, event_name, when }.

event_name.description: Event whose count must be displayed for every group, even if outside top-K.

when.description: Optional condition: e.g. 'always', or a trigger expression.

other_rollup_policy.description: Per Phase-1 finding: 'Other' row policy. 'never' = omit; 'if_a4_fetched_tail' = render only if A4 returned tail; 'always_fetch_tail_for_rollup' = A2 must plan an extra query for the tail aggregate.

required.description: When true, A5 must emit this block (empty if data is empty). When false, emit only if the data supports it.

mandatory_annotations.description: Annotation keys A5 MUST populate for this block within this report_type. Keys must be in the per-block-type approved-annotations set declared in a5-data-blocks.schema.json.

purpose.description: Free-form factual label for this block's role in the report. Example: 'summary KPIs', 'detail table'.

order.description: Render order within the funnel narrative.

intro.description: Templated intro caption for the stage. Method-framing, descriptive — never causal.

handoff.description: Bridging caption to the next stage. Method-framing only; never a causal link between stages.

NarrativeMatchValue.description: A match criterion: a single signal string, a non-empty list of acceptable signal strings, or "*" wildcard (matches anything).

NarrativeStageRule.description: First-match-wins rule. Any of metric/dimension/stage_kind/event may be omitted or "*" (wildcard). A rule matches a block when every specified (non-wildcard) key matches one of the block's corresponding signals.
